Content:
# [DailyAnimeList](#) - MyAnimeList Client ### A Flutter based MyAnimeList client with a clean and simple UI. [![Discord Users](https://img.shields.io/discord/1147503264741478452.svg?label=&labelColor=6A7EC2&color=7389D8&logo=discord&logoColor=FFFFFF)](https://discord.gg/ap4Wghv5e8) [![Github downloads](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/jica98/dailyal/total?label=downloads&labelColor=27303D&color=0D1117&logo=github&logoColor=FFFFFF&style=flat)](https://github.com/JICA98/DailyAL/releases) [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/jica98/dailyal?label=stars&labelColor=27303D&color=0D1117&logo=github&logoColor=FFFFFF&style=flat)](#) [![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/github/license/jica98/dailyal?labelColor=27303D&color=818cf8)](/LICENSE) [![Languages](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/count/jica98/dailyal?label=Languages&logo=googleearth)](/lib/l10n) ## Download [![GitHub Releases](https://img.shields.io/github/v/tag/jica98/dailyal?label=Github&logo=github&logoColor=FFFFFF)](https://github.com/JICA98/DailyAL/releases) [![f-droid](https://img.shields.io/f-droid/v/io.github.jica98?logo=f-droid&logoColor=FFFFFF)](https://f-droid.org/packages/io.github.jica98/) > **Note:** The app has been delisted from the Google Play Store. Please use GitHub Releases or F-Droid to download the app.
## Features Explore the extensive MyAnimeList database to discover your favorite anime and manga. Engage in forums with millions of discussions at your fingertips. Access detailed reviews and receive numerous recommendations for all anime and manga on MyAnimeList. ### Screenshots

RowTranslations.originContent: Explore the extensive MyAnimeList database to discover your favorite anime and manga. Engage in forums with millions of discussions at your fingertips. Access detailed reviews and receive numerous recommendations for all anime and manga on MyAnimeList.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Explore the extensive MyAnimeList database to discover your favorite anime and manga. Engage in forums with millions of discussions at your fingertips. Access detailed reviews and receive numerous recommendations for all anime and manga on MyAnimeList.

Content: ### ⚡️ Anime & Manga ⚡️ - Discover Seasonal Anime, Top Upcoming Anime, Most Popular Anime, Anime Ranking Lists, All-time Favorites, and more. - Access Anime/Manga Synopses, Related and Recommended content. - Read Detailed Anime reviews and view Anime/Manga Statistics. ### ⚡️ Theming and Customization ⚡️ - Choose from 4 distinct Dark Themes: Spring, Summer, Fall, and Winter. - Customize the Bottom Navigation bar and adjust cache update frequency. ### ⚡️ MyAnimeList Forums ⚡️ - Participate in forums dedicated to MyAnimeList, Anime & Manga, and General Discussions. ### ⚡️ Advanced Search Bar ⚡️ - Perform advanced searches directly from the search bar using "@" and "#" with ease. - Experience faster search loading times with caching mechanisms. ### ⚡️ User-Specific Features ⚡️ - Quickly Edit/Update your Anime/Manga List. - Sort your list by Title, List Score, Start Date, and Updated Date. ### Getting Started - To run this project, you need to have [Flutter](https://flutter.dev/docs/get-started/install) installed on your machine. - Clone this repo to your machine: `git clone` - Use `dal-code.code-workspace` to open the project in VSCode
Translation: ### ⚡️ 애니메이션 & 만화 ⚡️ - 계절별 애니메이션, 다가오는 인기 애니메이션, 가장 인기 있는 애니메이션, 애니메이션 순위 목록, 역대 인기작 등을 발견하세요. - 애니메이션/만화 줄거리, 관련 및 추천 콘텐츠에 접근하세요. - 상세한 애니메이션 리뷰를 읽고 애니메이션/만화 통계도 확인하세요. ### ⚡️ 테마 및 사용자화 ⚡️ - 봄, 여름, 가을, 겨울의 4가지 독특한 다크 테마 중 선택하세요. - 하단 내비게이션 바를 사용자화하고 캐시 업데이트 빈도를 조절하세요. ### ⚡️ MyAnimeList 포럼 ⚡️ - MyAnimeList, 애니메이션 & 만화, 일반 토론 전용 포럼에 참여하세요. ### ⚡️ 고급 검색창 ⚡️ - "@"와 "#"를 사용해 검색창에서 직접 고급 검색을 쉽게 수행하세요. - 캐싱 메커니즘으로 더 빠른 검색 로딩 시간을 경험하세요. ### ⚡️ 사용자 맞춤 기능 ⚡️ - 애니메이션/만화 목록을 빠르게 편집/업데이트하세요. - 제목, 목록 점수, 시작 날짜, 업데이트 날짜로 목록을 정렬하세요. ### 시작하기 - 이 프로젝트를 실행하려면 머신에 [Flutter](https://flutter.dev/docs/get-started/install)가 설치되어 있어야 합니다. - 이 저장소를 머신에 복제하세요: `git clone` - VSCode에서 프로젝트를 열려면 `dal-code.code-workspace`를 사용하세요

- Use `dal-code.code-workspace` to open the project in VSCode

Content:
- Run the script `update_gradle.sh` to make the gradle files ready for development
- Run `flutter pub get` to install dependencies
- Launch the app using `flutter run` or `F5` in VSCode

### Additional Setup

- Run user task - `intl generate` to generate localization files
- Run user task - `build runner` to generate necessary files
- Run user task - `python translate` to generate translation files

#### PS
- Please don't suggest any state management solutions.
Translation:
- gradle 파일을 개발 준비 상태로 만들기 위해 `update_gradle.sh` 스크립트를 실행하세요  
- `flutter pub get`을 실행하여 의존성을 설치하세요  
- `flutter run` 또는 VSCode에서 `F5`를 눌러 앱을 실행하세요  

### 추가 설정  

- 사용자 작업 실행 - `intl generate`로 로컬라이제이션 파일 생성  
- 사용자 작업 실행 - `build runner`로 필요한 파일 생성  
- 사용자 작업 실행 - `python translate`로 번역 파일 생성  

#### PS  
- 상태 관리 솔루션은 제안하지 마세요.
